scene_input.scene_summary: ʿUmar meets with Surāqah and gives him the bracelets.
scene_input.key_visual_action: ʿUmar handing the bracelets to Surāqah, Surāqah's surprised expression
scene_input.setting: A public gathering or meeting place

schema_output.scene_summary: ʿUmar meets with Surāqah and gives him the bracelets.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 119
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of generosity and gratitude

characters.name: ʿUmar ibn Al-Khattab
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades

characters.name: Surāqah ibn Mālik
characters.appearance: medium build, slightly surprised expression, wearing a plain brown thobe and a white cloth head covering

schema_output.narrative_text: ʿUmar, the companion of the Prophet, meets with Surāqah, a man who had previously been an enemy, and gives him the bracelets as a symbol of his gratitude.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A public gathering or meeting place, possibly a courtyard or a marketplace, with a mix of men and women in the background, dressed in traditional 7th century attire. The dominant color palette is a warm beige, with accents of deep blue, green, and golden brown. In the center of the scene, two figures sit facing each other on a low stone bench or a woven mat. On the left, the central figure seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended in a gesture of generosity. On the right, a man with a slightly surprised expression, wearing a plain brown thobe and a white cloth head covering, looking up at the central figure with a mix of curiosity and gratitude. Soft warm golden light, with a sense of intimacy and connection between the two characters. Medium close shot at eye level. Warm beige, golden, and blue palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. In the foreground, a small, intricately designed bronze or gold belt buckle lies on the ground, partially covered by the woven mat, as a symbol of the gift being given. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
